title: integrations — PHP attribute contracts
description: Two owned attributes discovered at boot via Foundation's DiscoversAttributes seam. #[AsIntegrationProvider] drives Lane 1 (native providers ship now); #[AsAppExtensionPoint] documents Lane 2 extension points (marketplace apps ship later per ADR 0025).

attributes.name: AsIntegrationProvider
attributes.description: Marks a class as a Lane 1 integration provider discoverable by IntegrationProviderRegistry. The bootstrapper scans every enabled module's `Integrations/Providers/` namespace for classes carrying this attribute. IntegrationProviderSeeder walks discovered providers + upserts the matching `integration_providers` row on `db:seed`. Runtime lookup is O(1) via ToolRegistry-style hash-map cache.

params.name: kind
params.description: One of: payment / crm / email / sms / calendar / chat / wallet / accounting / webhook / sso / video / storage.

params.name: authKind
params.description: oauth2 / api_key / basic / webhook_only. Drives the credential-input flow in the tenant admin UI.

params.name: minPlanTier
params.description: Optional. small / medium / enterprise. Provider hidden unless tenant is on this tier or higher.

attributes.example:
#[AsIntegrationProvider(slug: 'pipedrive', kind: 'crm', authKind: 'oauth2', minPlanTier: 'medium')]
final class PipedriveProvider implements IntegrationProviderInterface { /* ... */ }

attributes.name: AsAppExtensionPoint
attributes.description: Declares a documented extension point that Lane 2 apps may subscribe to when the marketplace launches. Documentation-only during the schema-only phase — reviewer + tooling scan for these attributes to build the app developer docs. When marketplace ships, this attribute drives the scope-check + webhook delivery path for AppWebhookSubscription rows.

params.name: event
params.description: Dot-separated event name from any module's events.json (e.g. `registrations.enrolled`, `attendance.recorded`, `medical.clearance_expired`).

params.name: requiredScopes
params.description: OAuth scope strings an app must hold in its granted_scopes to subscribe to this event. Enforced at subscription-create time when marketplace ships.

params.name: childData
params.description: True when the event payload contains minor-related data (athletes / medical / attendance / safeguarding). Auto-computed; setting explicitly documents intent.

attributes.example:
#[AsAppExtensionPoint(event: 'registrations.enrolled', requiredScopes: ['athletes:read', 'enrollments:read'], childData: true)]
final class RegistrationEnrolledEvent { /* ... */ }

output_registries: IntegrationProviderRegistry — map of slug → provider class + kind + auth_kind + scopes.
AppExtensionPointDocs — used by devtools to render the app developer reference. No runtime enforcement until marketplace launches.
discovery.cache: olvlvl/composer-attribute-collector static manifest at vendor/attributes.php. Octane-safe.
